title: [FIRRTL] infer width (neg)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp33: SInt<19>
    tmp33 <= neg(UInt(172273))
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: error: destination width 19 is not greater than or equal to source width 25
    tmp33 <= neg(UInt(172273))
          ^
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp33, %0) : (!firrtl.sint<19>, !firrtl.sint<25>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [18:0] tmp33
);
  assign tmp33 = 18'h0 - 18'h2a0f1;
endmodule
```
